name: Crispy Mustard Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mayonnaise and mustard in a small bowl; stir well.
2. Combine wheat germ and other ingredients except chicken in a shallow bowl.
3. Brush each chicken breast with mustard mixture, then dredge in breadcrumb mixture.
4. Place chicken in a 10x6x2 inches baking dish that has been coated with Pam.
5. Cover and bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
6. Uncover and bake an additional 20 minutes or until chicken is tender.
